newsSince: No new fundamental catalyst since June 9; June 19 coverage reiterated the AI-data-center water/cooling angle and recapped record Q1 (net sales $677M, +21% YoY, reported May 6) plus the Haws/Superior Boiler/Saudi Cast acquisitions. Stock +9.4% since prior refresh on continued data-center sentiment.

verdicts.rankRationale: Thermal/water node: continued data-center water/cooling commentary (June 19) reinforces the quiet flow-control compounder thesis, but it recaps the May-6 record Q1 rather than new evidence. Thesis intact and modestly affirmed since June 9; small positive, no rank change vs peers.
verdicts.bull: Data-center cooling/leak-prevention demand plus acquisitions broaden the AI-water TAM.
verdicts.neutral: Quality compounder, but data-center is still a modest slice; valuation richer after run.
verdicts.bear: Most AI-water upside arguably priced after +26% YTD and +9% move.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict adapted-use screen (valves/backflow/drainage/water-quality adapted to high-density facility water mgmt): the adapted-use evidence is unchanged since June 9 - June commentary is reiteration, not a new strict-pathway proof point. Hold stands.
verdicts.bull: Core flow/water-safety portfolio genuinely adaptable to dense facility water management.
verdicts.neutral: Adapted-use is plausible but still indirect under the strict lens.
verdicts.bear: AI-chain linkage remains inferential; no strict-pathway catalyst.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Smart valve/sensor adoption in dense facilities
verdicts.primaryRisk: Indirect AI exposure de-rated by strict screen
